education: BSc Computer Science, Addis Ababa University (2022)
summary: Passionate full-stack developer with 3 years of experience building web applications. Strong in React frontend and Node.js backend. Eager to work on impactful products.

education: MSc Data Science, Addis Ababa University (2024)
summary: Data scientist with expertise in NLP and machine learning. Built text classification models for Amharic content. Passionate about data-driven decision making in African tech.
DevOps engineer with deep cloud and infrastructure experience. Built Kubernetes clusters and CI/CD pipelines for large-scale Ethiopian enterprises.

education: BA Visual Communication, Addis Ababa University (2023)
summary: Creative UX designer passionate about building accessible, user-centered products for East African markets. Proficient in Figma with a strong design thinking foundation.

education: BSc Computer Science (AI Track), iCog Labs Fellowship (2022)
summary: ML engineer with a focus on NLP for low-resource African languages. Built TF-IDF pipelines and transformer models for Amharic text classification at iCog Labs.
Mobile developer specializing in React Native for both Android and iOS. Built fintech apps with Chapa payment integration. Passionate about offline-first mobile experiences.

education: BSc Computer Science, Bahir Dar University (2022)
summary: Backend engineer with strong Python/Django expertise. Built scalable REST APIs handling thousands of requests per second for Afriwork's freelance marketplace.
Product manager with fintech expertise. Led product launches at Kifiya reaching 50,000+ users. Strong background in agile and data-driven product development.

education: BSc Computer Science (Security), Addis Ababa University (2022)
summary: Cybersecurity analyst with CEH certification. Conducts penetration testing and vulnerability assessments for Ethiopia's largest telecom. Passionate about African cybersecurity.
Frontend developer building performant Next.js applications. Specialized in Tailwind CSS and responsive design. Contributed to Eshi Express's customer-facing web portal.
